tests.name: keeps busy active until first open visible and coalesces duplicate taps into one PDF open flow
tests.scenario: two fast taps on the same PDF key
tests.risk_covered: duplicate open path / double viewer entry
tests.expected_result: second tap joins in-flight flow; one viewer route; terminal readiness once

tests.name: blocks stale TTL-expired PDF results from opening over a newer run
tests.scenario: old access result resolves after a newer boundary run
tests.risk_covered: stale signed URL/result wins over current run
tests.expected_result: old run rejects with access_expired; only newer route opens

tests.name: classifies denied PDF access without entering the viewer
tests.risk_covered: permission failure masked as generic/open success

tests.name: does not enter the viewer before PDF readiness is confirmed
tests.expected_result: no route push before preparation resolves

tests.name: allows a clean retry after retryable PDF access failure
tests.scenario: first access fails with 503, second succeeds
tests.risk_covered: retryable failure leaves stale active owner
tests.expected_result: first terminalClass retryable_failure; second opens current PDF

tests.name: clears busy and reports open failure when viewer visibility fails after navigation
tests.scenario: viewer route pushed but visibility wait fails
tests.expected_result: promise rejects; busy clears; open_failed is observed

tests.name: blocks oversized PDF on iOS without pushing viewer route
